name: playing-to-win-how-strategy-really-works
description: A.G. Lafley and Roger Martin's five-question strategy framework used to transform Procter & Gamble — Winning Aspiration, Where to Play, How to Win, Capabilities, and Management Systems.
useCase: Develop a practical strategy for any business or initiative using the Strategy Logic Flow — a proven framework for making strategic choices and driving competitive advantage.
knownRisks: P&G-specific examples may not apply to all industries
Framework requires honest answers — wishful thinking invalidates it
Strategy execution depends on organizational factors beyond the framework
